concierge.title: Monday — Set the Week
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
📋 Prioritize: Reyla dev, Stability SBIR, InkThorn leads
📰 Publish or draft one piece of content today
📞 Check in with Jerry Hollister re: SBIR if pending
💰 Log any weekend expenses in finance tracker

private: 💌 Dress up a little — she notices
💬 Check in with Camille today — not just a quick text
🔥 Tonight with Camille: Set the mood — candles, music, phone on do not disturb

blocks.label: Morning Activation
tips: No phone first 20 minutes — walk, stretch, coffee
Uptown mornings are quiet and good. Use them.

blocks.label: Week Planning Sprint
tips: Top 3 for the week: Reyla, Stability SBIR, InkThorn
Block your deep work windows now or they disappear

blocks.label: Reyla Build Block
tips: First serious coding window — high focus, notifications off
Burton's job is sales. Your job is ship. Stay in your lane.

blocks.label: Lunch & Walk
tips: Magazine Street is right there — walk it
Eat real food. No takeout challenge: still on.

recommendation.name: Dat Dog or Stein's Deli
recommendation.note: Quick and real. Better than DoorDash and you know it.

blocks.label: Comms + Business Window
tips: Email, Stability SBIR follow-ups, Jerry Hollister check-in
Beaux Box Realty demo — confirm timeline if needed

blocks.label: Afternoon Build Block
tips: Second deep work window — ship one visible thing today
Reyla or TextOS. One concrete deliverable.

blocks.label: Cook Dinner
tips: Day 2 of no-takeout challenge — you've got a playbook
Check playbook/eating-better.md if you need inspiration

recommendation.name: Eating Better Playbook
recommendation.note: Day 2 menu is waiting. You planned this. Trust the plan.
